Contracts.title: Contract ledger
Contracts.subtitle: Backend contract and internal audit trail
Contracts.overviewDescription: This agreement now lives as a backend contract backed by the internal ledger, so we can audit balances and participant movements directly in-app.
Contracts.internalBalancesDescription: Snapshot of your current backend ledger buckets for this contract flow.

Contracts.amortizationDescription: Month-by-month schedule generated from the backend contract state.
Contracts.auditTrailDescription: Every row below is an internal ledger posting related to this contract.
